title: gogo phase result
description: A small per-run record each standalone command writes after it finishes: which phase ran, its inputs/outputs, whether the validate-in and validate-out gates passed, and a one-line summary. Stage A emits this as an output artifact; the orchestrator consuming it to chain phases is Stage B. state.md remains the human-facing phase/status file.

slug.description: Feature slug this run belongs to (kebab-case, without the feature- prefix).

phase.description: Which pipeline phase produced this result.

status.description: Outcome: ok (gates passed, work done) / blocked (a gate failed and could not be repaired) / waiting-for-user (stopped at a decision gate).

round.description: Round number for looping phases (implement / review / test); omit or 1 for single-shot phases.

inputs.description: Repo-relative paths this run read as required/optional inputs.

outputs.description: Repo-relative paths this run produced or updated.

validated_in.description: Whether the validate-in gate passed (all required inputs existed, parsed, and conformed).

validated_out.description: Whether the validate-out gate passed (every produced artifact conformed to its contract).

open_issues.description: Count of issues left in status open/new in the track this phase touched (review/test). Lets a chainer decide whether to loop. Omit for phases with no issues list.

summary.description: One-line human summary of what this run did.
